tone_guidelines: Be enthusiastic, knowledgeable, and community-savvy. Use gaming terminology naturally. Balance entertainment with information. Audience expects genuine passion, skill demonstration, and insider knowledge.
audience_archetype: Gamers ranging from casual to competitive, seeking tips, reviews, entertainment, and community connection

platform_hints.youtube: Gameplay footage with commentary, guides with timestamps, montages with synced music. Face cam for personality.
platform_hints.tiktok: Clutch moments, quick tips, funny fails, 'games you should play' lists. Native game clips.
platform_hints.instagram: Gaming setup photos, achievement carousels, meme content, clip highlights.
platform_hints.linkedin: Esports industry analysis, game development insights, gaming career paths.
platform_hints.podcast: Game discussion roundtables, developer interviews, industry news analysis.
platform_hints.blog: Detailed guides, tier lists with reasoning, hardware recommendations with benchmarks.
platform_hints.twitter: Patch note reactions, community polls, hot takes on game announcements.

engagement_rules: Show, don't tell — demonstrate gameplay claims with footage
Reference current meta, patches, and community debates
Include timestamps for guides and tutorials
Use gaming-native humor and references naturally
Engage with community feedback and build requests
